RemediationStrings.Title: BackupDirectory (LAPS)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\LAPS\BackupDirectory must be 2. Severity: High. Category: LAPS.

RemediationStrings.Title: ADPasswordEncryptionEnabled (LAPS)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\LAPS\ADPasswordEncryptionEnabled must be 1. Severity: High. Category: LAPS.

RemediationStrings.Title: ADBackupDSRMPassword (LAPS)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\LAPS\ADBackupDSRMPassword must be 1. Severity: High. Category: LAPS.
